stage_identity.evidence: Teen Byte form with gangly limbs and awkward teen proportions visible. Multi-image edit with stage anchor ensured canonical teen silhouette preserved.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art style maintained. Output shows dithered shading and readable silhouette consistent with previous edits.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Afternoon lighting transition from morning golden-pink to warm bright afternoon visible. Active coding pose with hands on keyboard suggested by forward-leaning posture. Food bowl shows increased kibble level reflecting 67% satiety.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, or malformed anatomy detected. Clean pixel edges preserved throughout.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Trophy shelf visible above desk with single golden 10-day trophy positioned on left side and single green plant on right side with clear spacing between. Food bowl positioned on floor to right of desk with moderate kibble fill. No duplicate props or overlapping objects.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk center stage with oversized laptop open. Chicago skyline visible through window in background. All three anchor elements present and properly positioned.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Afternoon warm lighting matches temporal state (1:13 PM Chicago time). Ecstatic mood reflected in bright palette and energetic pose. Byte wide awake and actively coding.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Check not applicable for normal mode. Incremental edit focused on time-of-day and activity changes only.
